subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant and firm in the Testament! The luminous letter, together with the monthly report of the blessed school, hath been received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت عهد و راسخ پیمان تحریر منیر با ورقه یکماهه مدرسه مبارکه وصول یافت از
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement
